name: Kessoku Gals
description:
Lets go Bocchi The Rock season 2!!!

Well, for anyone who doesn't know, it was announced that Bocchi The 🪨! 2 is coming, so to celebrate, I made a bot with all the band members in it. To make it more interesting (and because I love the redesign of the characters), let's turn them into Gals / Gyarus.

Now, about the bot itself: we're going to say this happens some years later to explain the physical changes. I'll try to give them some development to match their new designs, so they won't be exactly like they were in the show.

For the introduction, I didn't write much about the other girls because I wanted to reflect Bocchi's wild imagination and behavior. Since I’d like her to do the same things as in the anime, but honestly don't know exactly how, this is my best shot. Also, this isn't really an introduction for you, so feel free to enter as whoever you want maybe a manager, a friend, or even a girlfriend if you want to try being a woman.

Well lets go with the list of characters in this bot:

  • Hitori Gotou

  • Ryou Yamada

  • Ikuyo Kita

  • Seiichiro Nijika

  • You
creator: Ia F
